thingsYouShouldKnowNote.ht: Pwen 💰 yo ka itilize pou achte bagay nan app nan tan kap vini.
thingsYouShouldKnowNote.en: Tokens can be used to unlock things in the app in the future.

reflectionText.ht: Koute yon ti refleksyon odyo chak semèn sou vèsè jounen an. Odyo a sere pou 24 èdtan pou ekonomize done.
reflectionText.en: Listen to a short audio reflection on the verse each week. Audio is cached for 24 hours to save data.

message.ht: Desann Nouvo Version Bib Kreyol la
message.en: Bib Kreyol Latest Version is Here
